title: GPU Cost Overview
description: Use this dashboard to investigate GPU compute spend across AWS, Azure, and GCP, understand where your spend is concentrated by team and cloud, and correlate costs with GPU fleet utilization and health.

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{(aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances","Accelerated Computing")) AND $team}

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $team}

queries.name: query3
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Vertex* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*) AND $team}

queries.name: query4
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.unblended{aws_usage_type:*CapacityBlock* AND $team}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{(aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances","Accelerated Computing")) AND $team}

queries.name: query4
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.unblended{aws_usage_type:*CapacityBlock* AND $team}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{(aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances","Accelerated Computing")) AND $team}

queries.name: query4
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.unblended{aws_usage_type:*CapacityBlock* AND $team}

formulas.formula: ((query1 + query2 + query3 + query7) - (timeshift(query4, -2592000) + timeshift(query5, -2592000) + timeshift(query6, -2592000) + timeshift(query7, -2592000))) / (timeshift(query4, -2592000) + timeshift(query5, -2592000) + timeshift(query6, -2592000) + timeshift(query7, -2592000)) * 100

definition.title: Total GPU Spend by Cloud Provider

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:all.cost{((providername:aws AND aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances","Accelerated Computing")) OR (providername:azure AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND chargetype IN (Usage)) OR (providername:gcp AND NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Vertex* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*))) AND $team} by {providername}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances","Accelerated Computing") AND $team} by {team}.rollup(sum, monthly)

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $team} by {team}.rollup(sum, monthly)

queries.name: query3
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Vertex* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*) AND $team} by {team}.rollup(sum, monthly)

definition.content: Cost data reflects total cloud spend. Utilization values reflect only hosts reporting the Datadog Agent — [set up GPU Monitoring](https://docs.datadoghq.com/gpu_monitoring/setup/) to populate utilization widgets.

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{(aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances","Accelerated Computing")) AND $team}

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $team}

queries.name: query3
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Vertex* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*) AND $team}

queries.name: query4
queries.query: sum:gpu.device.total{cloud_provider IN (aws,azure,gcp) AND $team}

queries.name: query5
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.unblended{aws_usage_type:*CapacityBlock* AND $team}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:gpu.device.total{cloud_provider IN (aws,azure,gcp) AND $team}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: avg:gpu.sm_active{cloud_provider IN (aws,azure,gcp) AND $team}

formulas.formula: (query1 + query2 + query3 + query4) / (query5 + query6 + query7 + query8) * 100

definition.title: GPU Daily Spend vs Compute Utilization

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances","Accelerated Computing") AND $team}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query2
